name: estimate-component-evolution
description: Estimate the Wardley evolution position of a single component. Positions the component in evolution via the llm-direct strategy (primary, on the raw input), and surfaces its underlying capability via identify. A property-assessment listener runs ONCE after the main path, observing the identified component (named subject) through the 12-property solution lens and folding per-property insights into the JSON-labre envelope (failure-isolated, never the primary annotation). Returns a WardleyEvolutionAST analysis (gamma form: signals/reasoning/insights/result).
